title: Reviewer-flag pattern (item + reported value + method enum)
description: Adapted from anthropics/financial-services @ 1c2ece3467c3434ddd01e655970e35b773940a29 — managed-agent-cookbooks/valuation-reviewer/subagents/package-reader.yaml. Apache 2.0 (preserved). Adapted 2026-05-09 for Mahoraga: the upstream YAML targets PE-fund LP-reporting (portcos + as-of date + method enum). We re-target the same shape to autoresearch loop strategy reviews — each `item` is a strategy version, `reported_fv` is its reported sharpe/return/etc., and `method` enumerates how the score was produced. The `enum`-bounded method field is the load-bearing pattern: it forces the reviewer leaf-worker to pick from a closed set of valuation methodologies, which downstream code can switch on safely.
